stories.title: Fix type safety and consistency issues
stories.description: Fix Bug 11 (dynamic types in marker pipeline), Bug 13 (dynamic in BrowseHistory)

LocationBottomSheet uses AncientLocation instead of dynamic

stories.title: Verify all fixes compile and pass analysis

acceptanceCriteria: flutter analyze returns 'No issues found!' with zero errors and zero warnings
